formNotes: Feet shoulder-width. Don't lock out at top. Control the descent.
Push up, down slowly, i think back of machine was on setting 5
Full range through ball of foot. Slow and controlled.
Incline bench. Retract scapula. Press up and slightly back over upper chest.
Seated, retract scapula. Press overhead, full ROM.
Pull down a bit then get seated under cuchion and ready
Pull down a bit then get seated under cuchion and ready
Triceps machine height 17, used the trapezium kind of bar, keep everything fixed just hinged at elbows
Straightforward, seat higher is a bit better to get over it for full ROM.
I wasn't quite symmetrical, slightly out of the machine
Curl fully, pause at peak contraction. Slow controlled return to extension.
Height 16 or so, black handle grips, pull cables down, take a step out, lean over a bit, not too close to knee
